name: Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach (Vida Loca Phu Quoc Resort)
address: 118/18 Tran Hung Dao,Duong Dong, Phu Quoc, Kien Giang, Dương Đông, Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam
description:
Vida Loca - Nơi Lưu Trú Tuyệt Vời Ở Đảo Phú Quốc

Với vị trí tuyệt vời tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, Vida Loca là một khách sạn 3.0 sao đáng chú ý. Với 40 phòng nghỉ thoải mái và tiện nghi, khách sạn này là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thú vị trên hòn đảo xinh đẹp này.

Khách sạn Vida Loca có thời gian nhận phòng từ 02:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng đến 12:00 PM, đảm bảo rằng quý khách có đủ thời gian để thư giãn và khám phá Đảo Phú Quốc. Khách sạn đã được tu sửa lại vào năm 2021, mang đến không gian nghỉ dưỡng hiện đại và tiện nghi cho du khách.

Với chính sách cho trẻ em, Vida Loca cho phép trẻ em từ 6 tuổi trở xuống lưu trú miễn phí. Điều này làm cho khách sạn trở thành điểm đến lý tưởng cho gia đình muốn có một kỳ nghỉ thú vị và đáng nhớ trên Đảo Phú Quốc.

Trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời tại Vida Loca - Đảo Phú Quốc

Với một loạt các tiện ích giải trí đa dạng, Vida Loca tại Đảo Phú Quốc sẽ đem đến cho bạn những trải nghiệm không thể quên. Quý khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian thoáng đãng tại quầy bar của khách sạn, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức những ly cocktail độc đáo và hương vị tuyệt vời. Với không gian xanh mát của vườn, quý khách cũng có thể tổ chức các buổi tiệc ngoài trời, hẹn hò lãng mạn hoặc thư giãn cùng bạn bè và gia đình.

Tiện ích thể thao tại Vida Loca

Với nhiều tiện ích thể thao đa dạng, Vida Loca là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích hoạt động ngoài trời. Khách sạn có hồ bơi ngoài trời tuyệt đẹp, nơi bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh mát. Ngoài ra, Vida Loca còn có bãi biển riêng tư, nơi bạn có thể tắm nắng, tắm biển và thư giãn trong không gian yên tĩnh và tuyệt đẹp. 

Nếu bạn là người yêu thích câu cá, Vida Loca cũng cung cấp dịch vụ câu cá đáng chú ý. Hãy thử tài câu cá và trải nghiệm cảm giác hứng khởi khi bắt được những con cá đầy màu sắc. Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể tham gia các hoạt động lặn biển và lặn ngắm san hô tại đây. Khám phá vẻ đẹp dưới lòng biển, ngắm nhìn những sinh vật biển đa dạng và tận hưởng những khoảnh khắc đáng nhớ trong chuyến du lịch của bạn. 

Hãy tận hưởng những tiện ích thể thao tuyệt vời tại Vida Loca và tạo ra những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ!

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Vida Loca

Khách sạn Vida Loca tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, đem đến cho du khách những tiện nghi tiện lợi đáng kinh ngạc. Dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, dịch vụ giặt là, dịch vụ phòng, két an toàn, lễ tân, Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực chung, khu vực hút thuốc riêng, Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng, dịch vụ nhận phòng/nhận phòng nhanh, giữ hành lý, dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày - tất cả đều có mặt tại khách sạn này. Khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ nhận phòng/nhận phòng nhanh để tiết kiệm thời gian cho du khách và giữ hành lý an toàn. Bạn còn có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, dịch vụ giặt là và dịch vụ phòng tại khách sạn. Wi-Fi miễn phí cũng có sẵn trong tất cả các phòng và khu vực chung, giúp du khách kết nối dễ dàng với thế giới bên ngoài. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có khu vực hút thuốc riêng cho những khách có nhu cầu. Với tất cả những tiện nghi tiện lợi này, Vida Loca là sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho kỳ nghỉ của bạn tại Đảo Phú Quốc.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Vida Loca - Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam

Với nhiều tiện ích vận chuyển đa dạng, Vida Loca tại Đảo Phú Quốc là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của hòn đảo này. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đặt tour, giúp bạn dễ dàng khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng tại địa phương. Ngoài ra, Vida Loca còn có bãi đỗ xe miễn phí cho khách hàng sở hữu xe cá nhân, giúp bạn yên tâm về việc đỗ xe trong suốt thời gian lưu trú tại khách sạn. Nếu bạn không có xe cá nhân, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ xe đưa đón miễn phí, giúp bạn di chuyển dễ dàng trong khu vực.

Trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Vida Loca

Với những tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng, Vida Loca tạo ra một trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời cho du khách. Khách sạn này cung cấp dịch vụ phòng ăn trong suốt 24 giờ, cho phép bạn thưởng thức các món ăn ngon và đa dạng mọi lúc trong ngày. Bạn cũng có thể tận hưởng những bữa ăn tuyệt vời tại nhà hàng của khách sạn, nơi bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm những món ăn độc đáo và phong cách đa dạng. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ phòng của khách sạn cũng đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu ẩm thực của bạn, mang đến sự thuận tiện và thoải mái cho chuyến du lịch của bạn. Hãy bắt đầu ngày mới với bữa sáng tự chọn tại nhà hàng của khách sạn, nơi bạn sẽ tìm thấy một bữa sáng tự nhiên và ngon miệng để khởi động ngày mới của bạn.

Phòng ở Vida Loca - Lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời

Với Vida Loca, bạn sẽ tìm thấy một loạt các loại phòng phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu của bạn. Có phòng Deluxe Triple Sea View rộng rãi với diện tích 38 mét vuông, Quadraple Room với diện tích 32 mét vuông và Sea View Deluxe Double với diện tích 32 mét vuông, cung cấp cho bạn không gian thoải mái và tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp ra biển. Ngoài ra, còn có Standard Double Garden View, Standard Double Room, Superior Bungalow Garden View, Superior Double Garden View, Superior Triple Room, Twin Garden View và Two Bedroom Panorama Suite để bạn lựa chọn. Đặt phòng tại Vida Loca thông qua Agoda, bạn sẽ được hưởng mức giá tốt nhất và trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, không cần quá nhiều phiền toái.

Khám phá Dương Đông - Trung tâm sầm uất của Đảo Phú Quốc

Dương Đông là trung tâm hành chính và kinh tế của Đảo Phú Quốc, nằm ở phía Tây Nam của đảo. Với vị trí thuận lợi, Dương Đông đã trở thành điểm đến hấp dẫn cho du khách đến thăm Đảo Phú Quốc. 

Với bãi biển đẹp và nước biển trong xanh, Dương Đông thu hút du khách bởi không chỉ có thể tắm biển và thư giãn trên bãi cát trắng mịn, mà còn có thể tham gia vào các hoạt động ngoại khóa thú vị như lướt sóng, lặn biển và câu cá. Ngoài ra, khu vực này còn nổi tiếng với chợ đêm Dương Đông, nơi du khách có thể khám phá và trải nghiệm ẩm thực đường phố Việt Nam với các món ăn độc đáo và hương vị tuyệt vời.

Đương Đông cũng là nơi tập trung nhiều cửa hàng, quầy hàng và trung tâm mua sắm, đặc biệt là khu phố đi bộ Trần Hưng Đạo. Du khách có thể tìm thấy các sản phẩm thủ công mỹ nghệ, đồ lưu niệm và các mặt hàng đặc sản của Đảo Phú Quốc tại đây. Với không gian sôi động và đa dạng, Dương Đông là điểm đến lý tưởng để khám phá văn hóa, ẩm thực và mua sắm của Đảo Phú Quốc.

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay gần Đảo Phú Quốc đến Vida Loca

Vida Loca là một điểm đến tuyệt vời tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, và để đến đây từ sân bay, bạn có một số lựa chọn thuận tiện.

Sân bay quốc tế Phú Quốc (PQC) là sân bay gần nhất với Vida Loca. Từ sân bay, bạn có thể dễ dàng di chuyển bằng taxi hoặc xe đưa đón. Một chuyến đi bằng taxi sẽ mất khoảng 15 phút và bạn sẽ có cơ hội ngắm nhìn cảnh đẹp của đảo trong quá trình di chuyển.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể thuê xe máy từ sân bay để tự lái đến Vida Loca. Điều này sẽ cho phép bạn tự do khám phá Đảo Phú Quốc và tận hưởng cảnh quan độc đáo của nơi này. Đường đi từ sân bay đến Vida Loca rất dễ đi và có nhiều biển chỉ dẫn, vì vậy bạn không cần lo lắng về việc lạc đường.

Dù bạn chọn phương tiện gì, hãy chắc chắn rằng bạn đã sẵn sàng để khám phá Vida Loca - một điểm đến tuyệt vời để thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại Đảo Phú Quốc.

Khám phá các điểm đến nổi tiếng gần Vida Loca

Vida Loca tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, và có một số điểm đến nổi tiếng trong khu vực xung quanh. Khách sạn nằm gần bãi biển Long Beach, nơi du khách có thể tận hưởng ánh nắng vàng óng của bãi cát mịn màng. Điểm đến tiếp theo là Dinh Cậu, một ngọn hải đăng nổi tiếng với kiến trúc độc đáo và tầm nhìn tuyệt vời ra biển cả.

Nếu bạn muốn khám phá văn hóa và tôn giáo địa phương, bạn có thể đến Thánh thất Dương Đông, một ngôi đền tôn giáo đẹp mắt với kiến trúc truyền thống. Bảo tàng Cội Nguồn cũng là một lựa chọn thú vị, nơi bạn có thể tìm hiểu về lịch sử và văn hóa đa dạng của đảo. Đối với những ai muốn tìm kiếm sự tĩnh lặng và yên bình, Chùa Sư Muôn và Chùa Sùng Hưng là những điểm đến tuyệt vời để tham quan và thả hồn.

Ngoài ra, Vida Loca cũng gần với Chợ đêm Phú Quốc, nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đường phố đặc sản và mua sắm các sản phẩm địa phương. Suối Đá Bàn là một điểm đến thiên nhiên tuyệt vời, nơi bạn có thể tắm mình trong dòng nước trong xanh và ngắm nhìn cảnh quan hoang sơ. Khách sạn cũng nằm gần Siêu thị Mini Mart, thuận tiện cho việc mua sắm và tiếp cận các tiện ích hàng ngày. Với vị trí thuận lợi này, Vida Loca là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp và văn hóa của Đảo Phú Quốc.

Nhà hàng xung quanh Vida Loca

Vida Loca nằm trong khu vực có nhiều nhà hàng hấp dẫn. Bạn có thể thưởng thức hải sản tươi ngon tại Xin Chao seafood restaurant và Ra Khoi Restaurant. Nếu bạn muốn thử các món ăn Việt Nam đặc trưng, hãy ghé Saigonese Eatery. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức pizza ngon lành, The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao là lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Đối với những ai yêu thích ẩm thực Ấn Độ, Maharaja Lounge - Authentic Indian 100% Veg Restaurant và Ganesh Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc là những địa điểm không thể bỏ qua. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức burger và bia, hãy ghé Winston's Burgers & Beer. Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể tận hưởng không gian tuyệt đẹp và thức uống tại OCSEN Beach Bar & Club, Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant và Hanh Nhung Luxury.

Những điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng gần Vida Loca

Khi lưu trú tại Vida Loca, bạn sẽ có cơ hội khám phá những điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Cửa hàng đồ mỹ nghệ Phú Quốc là nơi bạn có thể tìm thấy những món đồ thủ công độc đáo và đẹp mắt. Ngọc trai Long Beach là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích mua sắm trang sức ngọc trai chất lượng. Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm không gian mua sắm địa phương, Chợ Dương Đông là lựa chọn hoàn hảo với đa dạng các sản phẩm từ thực phẩm đến quần áo. Đừng quên ghé qua Chợ đêm Phú Quốc để thưởng thức ẩm thực đường phố và mua sắm những món đồ lưu niệm độc đáo. Với những điểm mua sắm này, bạn sẽ có một trải nghiệm mua sắm tuyệt vời khi lưu trú tại Vida Loca.

Giá trung bình của phòng tại Vida Loca so với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại Đảo Phú Quốc

Với giá trung bình chỉ $42, Vida Loca là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn trải nghiệm hòn đảo Phú Quốc. So với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại Đảo Phú Quốc là $75, Vida Loca mang đến cho du khách một sự lựa chọn tiết kiệm và đáng giá. Dù giá phòng thấp hơn so với trung bình, nhưng chất lượng dịch vụ và tiện nghi tại Vida Loca vẫn được đảm bảo và đáng kinh ngạc. Du khách sẽ được tận hưởng không gian thoải mái và tiện nghi hiện đại trong khi tiết kiệm được một khoản tiền đáng kể.

Một Kỳ Nghỉ Tuyệt Vời tại Vida Loca

Với thiết kế hiện đại, không gian vô cùng sạch sẽ và khuôn viên đẹp mắt, Vida Loca chính là điểm đến lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ của bạn. Đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện và chu đáo sẽ khiến bạn cảm thấy như đang ở nhà. Dịch vụ tuyệt vời từ tất cả các thành viên nhân viên đã mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời. Phòng nghỉ hoàn hảo cho việc tận hưởng bãi biển. Đặc biệt, đây là một địa điểm lý tưởng cho các gia đình có trẻ em, nơi chúng có thể dành cả ngày chơi cát trên bãi biển. Ngoài ra, resort cũng mang lại sự đáng giá tuyệt vời cho giá tiền. Bể bơi tuyệt đẹp, bạn có thể thưởng thức bữa sáng ngay trên bãi biển và quầy bar cũng rất tốt. Phòng gia đình rộng rãi và sạch sẽ. Tôi chắc chắn sẽ quay lại đây :) Nơi nghỉ này thực sự sạch sẽ và được trang bị đầy đủ, đặc biệt là tủ lạnh luôn giữ lạnh tốt.

Đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng về Vida Loca, Phú Quốc

Với tổng điểm đánh giá 8.9, Vida Loca tại Đảo Phú Quốc đã nhận được những lời khen ngợi tích cực từ khách hàng. Khách hàng đánh giá cao sự đáng giá của khách sạn với điểm 9.0, cho thấy giá trị tuyệt vời mà khách hàng nhận được khi lưu trú tại đây. Điểm đánh giá 8.7 cho tiện nghi và sạch sẽ cũng chứng tỏ rằng Vida Loca mang đến sự thoải mái và tiện nghi cho khách hàng.

Nằm tại vị trí đắc địa, Vida Loca nhận được điểm đánh giá 9.2 cho vị trí của mình. Khách sạn này nằm gần các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng, nhà hàng, cửa hàng và bãi biển, mang đến sự thuận tiện cho khách hàng khi khám phá Đảo Phú Quốc. Đội ngũ nhân viên của Vida Loca cũng nhận được sự đánh giá cao với điểm 9.1 cho hiệu suất làm việc. Sự nhiệt tình và chuyên nghiệp của nhân viên đảm bảo rằng khách hàng sẽ có trải nghiệm tuyệt vời khi ở đây.

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: Khách sạn có vị trí địa lý tốt, xung quanh là trung tâm thương mại lớn và nhiều nhà hàng. Khách sạn có hồ bơi riêng, chỉ cần đi vài bước là tới bãi biển, bãi biển không đông người, có nhiều ghế dài để nghỉ ngơi, khách sạn có nhà hàng riêng, giá cả hợp lý, hương vị ngon. Nhược điểm duy nhất có lẽ là có nhiều muỗi, nhưng đây là vấn đề không thể tránh khỏi ở vùng nhiệt đới. Nhân viên rất thân thiện, cô lễ tân có thể giao tiếp bằng tiếng Anh, tiện nghi phòng mang phong cách Pháp, bữa sáng miễn phí rất phong phú, khuyên dùng.
sample_comments.title: Gợi ý
Vạn sự như ý
sample_comments.positives:
Thật tuyệt khi được trở lại một nơi mà bạn biết tất cả mọi người và họ nhận ra bạn. Mọi người đều mỉm cười. Cảm ơn vì những nụ cười của bạn.
Nhân viên tiếp tân tại quầy lễ tân, người phục vụ và người giúp việc. Bạn là đội tốt nhất.

sample_comments.text: Đây là một chỗ ở nằm ở giữa Phú Quốc. Nơi đây được trang trí giống như một ngôi làng địa phương, khuôn viên cũng được thiết kế rất ngộ nghĩnh như một khu nghỉ mát. Tôi đã được phân phòng số 39, có tầm nhìn ra biển rất đẹp và ngay cả nhà hàng ăn sáng cũng có thể ngắm biển trong khi ăn. Hồ bơi tuy nhỏ nhưng được thiết kế như một hồ bơi vô cực. Phòng tắm có bồn rửa, vòi tắm và toilet được tách riêng, bồn tắm và bồn rửa không có quạt thông gió nên có chút nấm mốc ở nhà vệ sinh (có thể hiểu được). Họ cung cấp khăn tắm và ga trải giường sạch sẽ hàng ngày, và tất cả nhân viên đều rất thân thiện. Gần đó có King Kong Mart, Meo Kitchen, Oxen Bar, rất tiện lợi để đi bộ. Tôi đã đặt phòng gấp ngay trước kỳ nghỉ Tết và phải trả giá tương đối cao, nhưng tôi rất hài lòng đến mức muốn quay lại, kể cả khi đến vào thời gian khác. Tôi khuyên tất cả các cặp đôi và gia đình nên đến đây.
sample_comments.title: Nơi lưu trú xinh xắn mang không khí địa phương ở Phú Quốc (gợi ý)
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Deluxe giường đôi Hướng biển

sample_comments.title: Gia đình có một kỳ nghỉ Tet Giáp Thin 2024 vui vẻ, trọn vẹn yêu thương và hạnh phúc !
sample_comments.positives: Ăn Bufer sáng ngon rất tuyệt. View biển tạo cảm giác thoải mái và thân thiện. Đi lại các điểm tham quan hot nhất PQ không quá xa chị tâm 10~20 phút ô tô hoặc xe máy.
sample_comments.negatives: Ở gần biển nhưng có rất nhiều muỗi !

sample_comments.text: Chuyến đi này kéo dài chín ngày tám đêm, sắp xếp ở miền nam bốn đêm, miền bắc hai đêm, miền trung hai đêm, trước đó đã đặt những khách sạn lớn và nổi tiếng, nhưng kết quả trải nghiệm rất tệ, đông người, không có dịch vụ, ngay cả ghế nằm cũng phải tranh giành... Cuối cùng, khách sạn này là một gợi ý tình cờ trên Xiaohongshu, ban đầu không kỳ vọng nhiều, chỉ thấy gần sân bay, thuận tiện để đi siêu thị Kim Cương, đi chợ đêm và ra sân bay, không ngờ khi đến thì hoàn toàn bất ngờ! Môi trường yên tĩnh và đẹp, có hồ bơi vô cực, bãi biển riêng, khoảng hơn hai mươi phòng, nhiều ghế nằm để tùy ý dùng, còn có xích đu lớn, ra khỏi phòng đi xuống cầu thang là đến bãi biển; phòng cũng khá lớn, rất thoải mái, nước nóng vừa mạnh vừa nóng ( ở căn hộ Hyatt Jade Bay thì chưa bao giờ tắm nước nóng thoải mái như thế), đệm và gối vừa đủ mềm cứng (gối của Wyndham mềm như vậy! Hai cái gối mới đủ cao), khăn tắm cũng mới tinh sạch sẽ (khăn của Wyndham thì cũ cũ bị xơ và đổi hai ngày một lần) còn có khăn tắm đi biển đi kèm! Hơn nữa còn có thể ăn sáng hướng ra biển, phong cảnh đẹp như một bức tranh. Vì vậy chúng tôi quyết định từ bỏ kế hoạch đi đảo và mua sắm, quyết định ở lại khách sạn, lặn ngắm san hô ở bãi biển riêng, mặc dù đáy biển không trong suốt lắm, nhưng đã thấy nhiều cá, cua và cua đất... bắt được sò mắt mèo... còn thấy một con lươn biển! Cuối cùng, vào ngày cuối trước khi trở về, chúng tôi thực sự có cảm giác đi nghỉ, vừa may mắn vừa đáng tiếc, giá như biết ở năm ngày đều ở đây thì tốt biết mấy...

sample_comments.title: An okay resort. Better options available out there
sample_comments.text:
This resort is just an okay resort, and there is not much to scream about. There are plus and minus points about this resort and I will summarize below.
PLUS: beach front location, nice beach with lots of lounge chairs and tables/chairs to sit and relax. Resto is nearby to order beverages while relaxing. Breakfast buffet is decent with changing offerings each morning. Housekeeping is prompt every day to change your towels. Staffs is extremely courteous and friendly.
MINUS: For a 3* rated, resto menu items are on the high side. Facilities are okay but the imperfection in the details kind of throw me off. For example, the infinity pool is nice but the rough edges of the tiles inside the pool gave me scratches here and there. We rented a 2-BR panorama suite but the rough edges of the room threw me off also (eg. no closet in both BR, too many non-working switches, double door leading out to the terrace has two different handles and do not even close properly tight. View from terrace is okay, partly obstructed by outside stairway leading to upper floor. Cannot even enjoy outdoor at night since there is no light out on terrace, mine is probably an exception since I see porch lights at other bungalows. Oddity of 2 back to back doors at connecting entry way between the 2 BR). 
SUMMARY: except for the pluses mentioned above, this resort facilities look to be put together in a half-baked fashion and amenities are sort of hit-and-miss. I would rate it overall a 2* (instead of 3) and for the prices, there are better options on the island. Did contemplate of moving on first day, but decided to put up with it since its a short stay.

We especially liked the green grass and shade from the trees. The staff are friendly and helpful. Thanks Nhan and Ms Thanh for a wonderful week! -The Canadians

sample_comments.title: Ok, not great.
sample_comments.text:
We recently stayed at this hotel in Phu Quoc, and while the location is fantastic---right on the beach with a nice pool---the overall experience fell a bit short of expectations. 

The hotel's photos make it look much more polished than it actually is. It's more run down than advertised, and in need of some updates. We paid extra for a "deluxe sea view" room, but the view was partial at best. The patio had only an awkward daybed and no chairs, making it difficult to actually enjoy sitting outside. 

Breakfast was quite good, but service in the bar and restaurant during other times was extremely slow. Overall, if you're just looking for a beachfront spot with a decent breakfast, it's okay, but don't expect the level of comfort or upkeep shown in the pictures.

sample_comments.title: Paradise on a budget
sample_comments.positives: Staff, beach, food, location, pool, entertainment were all exceptional! A special mention to the Manager - Nhan - who went out of his way to help us. The live entertainment from Chad and the seafood beach barbeque make it a special night. You can walk to all the shops and restaurents and then chill out in the quiet resort. Yellow sand, clear water and amazing sunsets. Highly recomend!
sample_comments.negatives: Had an issue with the garden bungalow - it is not like it looks in the pictures so that was disappointing. We moved rooms and staff were very helpful. Some of the rooms have been renovated and some have not - the trick is to get the renovated rooms. Other issue is selfish people hogging sunbeds all day and not using them - resort needs a one hour rule - you dont use the bed you lose it!

sample_comments.title: Rock Hard Bed!
sample_comments.text:
I booked for nine nights but only stayed for two nights as the bed was punishingly hard. Even my partner who can sleep on anything found it too hard. 

There are positives. The location is excellent with a beautiful beach where you can sit at tables in the sand with meals offered all day and great prices. 

The state of the rooms and the pool however is tired and in need of TLC. 

The shower needs regrouting and the pool with its green colour was uninviting so we did not swim there. 

I did message the property before my stay and ask for a softer bed and they said they would help. But that was not the case and I could not bear another night in pain. We found another hotel with a comfortable bed. 

.

Cet hôtel est très bien situé car il est à quelques pas de nombreux bars et restaurants et il y a même le plus grand supermarché de Phu Quoc. Le jeune homme qui est à la réception est très serviable et il fait tout pour satisfaire vos demandes. L'ensemble du personnel est aimable.
sample_comments.negatives: Le gros problème de cet hôtel c'est la piscine dont les horaires commencent tôt le matin et ferme jusqu'à 22 heures et passer des vacances dans les cris et les hurlements des enfants qui sont toute la journée à la piscine cela n'est pas reposant. Les portes des chambres laissent entendre les cris des enfants dans la chambre toute la journée ! L'hôtel commence à vieillir, j'ai même trouvé le carrelage de ma terrasse cassé. Il y a des traces de moisissures dans la douche et la climatisation est insuffisante. Le ventilateur de la chambre n'a plus de pales. C'est un hôtel pour les familles mais vivement déconseillé à ceux qui veulent passer des vacances reposantes !

sample_comments.title: Avg Resort at great location
sample_comments.text:
1. The family room was small quite small than regular family suites, despite you pay good price.
2. Have traveled 26 countries, never saw how a receptionist is warning against the fines to Customer, if you dirty the bedsheets or towels, its just give a negative vibes on first instant.
3. I wanted to take another room, spoke with the receptionist, was ready to negotiate per day additional price, but as soon as I came back after seeing room, the receptionist told its sold away in just 10 to 15mins.
4. Most unprofessional way, while you should give first preference and curtesy to ask, if I am ready or not, while I have already shown interest.
5. Even for staying guest they dont allow their own food and drinks at beach, we have to buy the drinks from their hotel beach side resturant.
6. Breakfast is Good not Excellent, its almost same everyday, but few staff at Breakfast are not helpful, I had to rush for an activity, i just asked two boiled eggs to be packed at 7.15 am for my child , they uprightly denied. 
7. The swimming pool was dirty for both days I tried to swim. Not maintained well.
8. Location is Excellent, walk for 2 mins and you find many eateries and Super markets around, they have their own private beach.
9. Its in middle of phu quoc, so you have to go for activities towards south (sunset town, cable car) or north for Vinwonders and Safari etc. Both are 15 to 20Kms each side.

10. Rest few staff is helpful like the bell boy, lady at receptionist.

3.5/5, 7.5/10

Zwischen den Hotelliegen waren leider zahlreiche Zigarettenreste und Dosenclips, die während meines Aufenthaltes immer mehr wurden.
An meinem letzten Tag war nebenan am öffentlich Abschnitt eine kleine Baustelle und ein Teil der öffentlichen liegen fehlte, wodurch sich die Leute vor den Hotelbereich verlagert haben und der Weg von den Hotelliegen zum Meer leider mit Handtüchern und vielen Leuten gepflastert war, das war vielleicht nur eine Momentaufnahme und liegt natürlich nicht in der Hand des Hotels.

sample_comments.title: ロングビーチのお手頃リゾート
sample_comments.text:
オフシーズンとはいえ、4人で寝られる部屋で50ドルしないのはありがたい。
朝ごはんのビュッフェもホテルの価格帯に対してクオリティ高かったです。
残念ながら雨季の中でも大しけのタイミングになってしまい、海はざっぷんざっぷん、プールも水が冷たかったけれど、天気が良ければ夕陽も絶対きれいだろうし、いいロケーションなんだろうと思います。
夜、ビーチ沿いに歩いて数件お隣にかなり流行っているファイヤーダンスで盛り上がるバーがあって、子供も含めて楽しめた。
徒歩で大通りに出てもそこそこ飲食店やスーパーがあるし、路地内にタクシーもいっぱい待ってる。
大通りに出れば無料のシャトルバスも走っていてナイトマーケットに行くのには全く不便を感じなかったです。
部屋の寝具はピシッと清潔なシーツ、タオルで気持ちよかったが。
雨季で湿度が高いのに、たった一本のルームキーを刺さないとエアコンが入らないので部屋のジメジメがひどい。留守中にガンガンエアコン無駄つかいするつもりは無いけれど、ドライ運転くらいはしたかった。
シャワーの温水器は十分温かかったが、水圧は弱い。
ただ、この価格帯としては、アメニティもちゃんとあるし、かなり良いリゾート。
あとは、フロントのスタッフがもう少しホスピタリティあるといいかな～。「雨で船のツアーはお休みだよ」と言った後に代わりの過ごし方提案してくれる、とかすると良かった。

sample_comments.title: idyllischer geht's nicht
sample_comments.positives: Die kleinen Häuschen wunderschön direkt am Pool und sehr nah am Strand gelegen. Total idyllisch. In der Buchung war ein oneway Flughafentransfer inklusive sehr praktisch
sample_comments.negatives: etwas kompliziert mit den Bett Buchung und Belegung der Zimmer mit den Kindern. Letztendlich hat alles geklappt.

sample_comments.title: Nice beach location, rooms could be better
sample_comments.text:
The staff and location of Vida Loca are great. The hotel is located close to lots of restaurants and the beach on the property is great. 

The downside is the breakfast was just "ok", not great. The private bungalow room was cozy, but very stuffy with poor circulation. The hotel is also right next to a beach club which blasts music until ~1am. 

It's alright but overall a bit disappointing. Could be better for the price.

sample_comments.title: würden wieder buchen
sample_comments.positives: Das tolle Frühstück, der Mopedverleih, der außergewöhnliche Infinitypool am Strand.
sample_comments.negatives: Der Strand war immer wieder mal ein wenig verunreinigt, da Plastik ans Ufer schwimmt.

sample_comments.title: Great clean beach
sample_comments.text:
Pros:
- beautiful clean beach right at the resort. 
- nice swimming pool, although a bit cold

Cons:
- waitress (initials are T.A) at the restaurant / bar "accidentally" gave us the wrong change.... Twice. Count your money carefully. 
- breakfast was not as good as other hotels we stays at in Vietnam
- we stayed in the main building. It was incredibly loud and you can hear people closing their doors and talking on a different floor. Hard to sleep. 
- restaurant needs to be on top of clearing tables in the morning. We stayed for 6 days and found they would have tables left for an hour full of dirty plates. 
- we had to ask housekeeping to tidy our room THREE times before they would come. We only used their services once in the 6 days we were there. 

This resort has so much potential. It's sad. The place looks a bit run down. Great location. Could be a really awesome place if they touched up on paint and fixed some broken doors, latches, etc.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Madeline,
Thank you for your review. 
We are very sorry to hear that you have unplesant stay at Vida Loca resort and Sunset beach. Your review help us to improved our services in the furure. i will share your feed back to our team and we hope to welcome you back in near future with improving the services.
Best Regard!

Luyen Hoang - Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Das kleine, schöne Resort liegt direkt am Strand. Es gibt ein Haupthaus und viele kleine Bungalows. Wir hatten zwei der kleinen Holzbungalows, die wir sehr schön fanden, ausreichend Platz, sehr sauber, sehr bequeme Betten und ein kleines Terrasse.
Der Strand ist sehr schön, es war nicht überlaufen, ausreichend Liegen vorhanden und schöne schattige Plätze durch die vielen Palmen. Der Strand wurde gepflegt und immer aufgeräumt, für den manchmal vorhandenen Plastikmüll kann das Hotel nichts. Der Pool hat einen tollen Blick aufs mehr und war erfrischend.
Fußläufig gibt es viele Restaurants, Bars, Supermarkt. Mopeds kann man zu einem guten Preis über das Hotel buchen.
Frühstück, alles was man braucht, asiatisch als auch europäisch. 
Das Restaurant sehr gut, besonders das BBQ am Strand mit Live-Musik. Ein super Angebot und tolle Preise.
Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und gibt sich viel Mühe.
Wir hatten eine wunderbare Zeit!!

sample_comments.title: Perfect stay at the beach
sample_comments.text: The resort was located very well and we enjoyed a calm stay with direct beach access. We enjoyed our breakfast with view over the ocean and the nice beach.

sample_comments.title: Für uns perfekt
sample_comments.positives:
Wir haben den Urlaub sehr genossen und fanden es in dem Resort für uns als Familie mit zwei kleinen Kindern perfekt. Der Pool liegt eigentlich den ganzen Tag über im Schatten. Der Weg zum Strand ist kurz. Leider ist der Weg dorthin mit Steinen gepflastert, die teilweise Verletzungsrisiken beinhalten. Die Steine unter der Schaukel und die Holzpaletten unter der Hängematte sollten ebenso entfernt werden!!!!
Das Frühstück war sehr umfangreich und lecker. Im Restaurant haben wir nur einmal gegessen. Das vegetarische Curry können wir empfehlen. Die Pommes eher nicht so
sample_comments.negatives: Lediglich die Massage unten am Strand würde ich nicht empfehlen, diese gehört aber ja auch nicht zum Resort dazu.

Der Strand ist gepflegt und direkt vor der Nase, es gibt sehr viele Restaurants in walking distance, Einkaufsmöglichkeiten ca. 3 Minuten Fußweg entfernt. Das Frühstück war sehr umfangreich und lecker. Die warmen Speisen waren täglich wechselnd.
sample_comments.negatives: Die Matratzen in den Standard Zimmern sind leider sehr hart und recht ungemütlich. Es gab Momente wo keine liegen am Strand frei waren, da es mehr Gäste als liegen gibt.

Ich hatte einen wunderbaren Aufenthalt! Mein gemütlicher Bungalow lag nur wenige Schritte vom Pool und Strand entfernt. Die Ausstattung lässt keine Wünsche offen und es wird täglich gereinigt. 
Es gab bequeme Liegen und sogar eine Hängematte am Strand. Das Restaurant hat einen fantastischen Blick aufs Meer, das Frühstücksbuffet bietet eine grosse Auswahl an europäischen und vietnamesischen Speisen. Das Restaurant hat tagsüber durchgehend geöffnet, abends gibt es Barbecue am Strand.
sample_comments.negatives: Das Team am Empfang ist kompetent, sehr hilfsbereit und freundlich. Leider fehlt dem Serviceteam im Restaurant teilweise die Freude und Motivation.. Der Service ist ok, mit Luft nach oben.

sample_comments.title: Not perfect, but a very good accommodation.
sample_comments.text: The beach is easily accessible, and the price is relatively low compared to other hotels. The swimming pool is a bit deep and small for children to play, but it was still enjoyable enough. The breakfast variety is not extensive, but the pho that changes daily is really delicious. The room we stayed in had peeling paint, a lot of mosquitoes, and low water pressure, but it wasn't too uncomfortable.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text:
We stayed in two types of accommodation at Vida Loca, one being the more expensive wooden bungalows as they call them. We stayed in Number 29. They are very compact shall we say and the double bed in the bedroom section is only accessible from one side, consequently someone has to climb over the other at some point should they need the bathroom.
There is no mirror in the bathroom which is a bit of a pain. The outdoor furniture should you want to sit out on the small terrace is not comfortable at all.
The half barrel property as we called it was very clean and well equipped with a good cold fridge.
However, we did have an unwelcome resident in the form of a rat, which ran out of the bedroom across the lounge area and took refuge behind the units. (The other half was asleep at this point). I reported the incident the morning after and the staff came round and removed the units and the rascal had checked out for the day. I worked out the culprit was gaining access under the entry door

sample_comments.title: Only one thing that make us not happy
sample_comments.text:
We stayed in Vida Loca Resort for two nights, the only thing that make us not very happy is when we just arrived the reception lady force us to paid another around 14 usd for our son's breakfast fee for 2 days. She said that he already reached 7 years old,but for Asians counting my son was born sept 2019,, only when sept 2026 that he is seven. She just keep saying company policy,, even when we do booking through agoda , website didn't ask us for extra paid. If this really happens, better stated it at the booking. Because I saw a Korean family in the next day with same problem arguing at the reception, this really bring people bad impression. 
Although the beach is good, the facilities is not bad, the massage at the beach is so much cheaper than on the street, the variety of breakfast is not bad. But I think agoda should get involved with this matter, and encourage them to get this problem solved to lower down the disappointment. Thank you

sample_comments.title: A Tranquil Retreat for Nature Lovers
sample_comments.text:
If you're planning a trip filled with sightseeing and spending most of your time outside the hotel, this resort may not be the most convenient option. It's located slightly off the main road, and access is via a narrow lane---large vehicles like buses may have difficulty reaching the property.

However, if your goal is to relax and unwind in a peaceful, nature-filled setting, this resort is an excellent choice. It's the perfect place to disconnect and enjoy your holiday within the serene surroundings. There's plenty to do within the resort itself to keep you entertained throughout the day and night.

The staff are exceptionally friendly and go out of their way to make you feel welcome. The breakfast offered is delicious, and the cleanliness of the resort is well-maintained. I truly enjoyed my stay and would definitely return.

sample_comments.title: Quiet place and cleaninesss

sample_comments.title: Above average

sample_comments.negatives: Это пляж Bà Kèo города Зыонг Донг, следовательно Вы должны понимать какое здесь море, я не стал купаться.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful location
sample_comments.text: Fantastic location and the staff were wonderful! The only minor issue was the shower, which could use an upgrade as the water was pooling.

sample_comments.title: Неплохой отель 3 звезды, чистый пляж, места немного, парк очень маленький. Чисто.
sample_comments.positives: Чисто, спокойно, нет городского шума. На самом берегу стоит отель, один из последних. Небольшая территория и маленькие бунгало с террасами. Есть бассейн. Чистый пляж, массажистка на пляже. Три раза в неделю барбекю с живой музыкой, столы ставят прям у воды. Певец из Канады, шикарно поёт, репертуар 80-х годов. Отель на 3 звезды. Есть очень модерновые бунгало, большие, но однокомнатные. Есть двухкомнатные, но в них очень мало места и все уже старое обветшалое. Поэтому на двоих советую брать однокомнатное бунгало. Душ в них огромный, современный. Все новое и чистое. Инет хороший, можно работать. До супермаркета Кин Конг идти пешком 10 мин. В нем есть все, большой, и очень дёшево.
sample_comments.negatives: Двухместные бунгало очень маленькие, в душе не развернуться, есть плесень. Шкафы старые как и плечики, порой жалко вешать дорогие и хорошие вещи. На завтраки очень мало фруктов и их не подкладывать, если они закончились. Например, арбузы или драгонфрукт.

sample_comments.title: I recommend family or couple trips.
sample_comments.text: The room condition is fine. The staff is friendly~ It's a great place for taking pictures. However, the pool water was a bit dirty and too cold, making it disappointing for the kids to play for a long time. The breakfast was substantial and good~ But... while eating food with a view of the sea is great for taking wonderful pictures, there is sewage water directly below that is being left untreated, causing an unpleasant smell and insects, which was very uncomfortable. The food ordered from the restaurant was also reasonably priced and tasty. If you pay attention to the pool and sewage water treatment, I would highly recommend this place.
sample_comments.response: Thank you very much for staying at Vida Loca Sunset Beach Resort for taking the time to share your feedback. I would like to sincerely apologize for the shortfall in service. Your feedback is a vital part of our business and it is through your constructive comments that we are able to improve the service we offer to our guests. It would be our pleasure to have the chance of welcoming you back to Vida Loca in the near future, Sincerely, Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: Недорогой отель, с отличной территорией и хорошим персоналом. Номер 27 великолепен!
sample_comments.positives:
У отеля прекрасный пляж и расположение непосредственно на первой линии, на пляже. Но обратите внимание, что море на этой части пахнет, оно не чистое. Это никак не касается отеля. Рядом город, похоже канализация вся в эту часть моря. 
В отеле при возможности надо брать номер 27 в общем здании. Он большой и с прекрасным балконом и видом. Завтраки отличные, с видом на море.
sample_comments.negatives: Требует ремонта, запах краски наложенный на краску, видимо так справляются с плесенью. Море неприятный запах имеет, вообще не очень чистое побережье.

sample_comments.title: Used every time.
sample_comments.text: Phu Quoc 5-bang. Spending half a month in Vietnam living in Phu Quoc, I always use this place for cost-effectiveness. I've tried various room types... they're well managed. Every time the prices in Phu Quoc go up, it's becoming harder to find budget accommodations. The ocean view room above the restaurant was built last year, and it's nice because it's new. The terrace is spacious as it uses the entire roof. I couldn't book consecutive nights, so I'm in a room facing the beach. I move around the bungalow room. It's cozy for one or two people. Five years ago, I praised this place as a cost-effective accommodation right by the beach on my blog, but now it's not really a budget option anymore. Cars have to come through narrow alleys, so Grab doesn't come here. It might be inconvenient for families calling for larger vehicles. The staff in the evening are friendly and smile a lot. During this time, the weather in Phu Quoc is the best in Vietnam, perfect for swimming.

sample_comments.title: Парень с ресепшен помог забронировать спа, поехал ради нас. Очень понравилось расположение и в целом отель по цене/к
sample_comments.positives: Отель расположен в прекрасном месте, рядом остановка автобуса, много кафе и магазинов. Очень доброжелательный персонал. Очень хороший завтрак
sample_comments.negatives: Мало места в номере для вещей, душно, кондиционер работает только при нахождении в номере. Спать без кондиционера не возможно

sample_comments.title: Unforgettable dancing night on my dad's 70th birthday.
sample_comments.text:
At check-in, we found out there would be live music and a beach BBQ at night.

The singer had an amazing voice, and we were enjoying drinks and the resort atmosphere. Then guests around us started making song requests, and the mood got lively. Eventually everyone including my family started dancing together. My family never dances in Japan, and I had not really seen my parents or my sister dance before, so sharing that moment with guests from Australia, Russia, and many others made the night unforgettable.

The breakfast, the view, the beach access, the pool, and the spacious room were all cozy. It became a perfect family trip. Thank you to the staff, and to the singer with the beautiful voice for making the night so special.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Местоположение отличное, завтраки хорошие шведский стол, бассейн чистый, пляжные полотенца предоставляются в номере. Постельное белье отличное.
sample_comments.negatives: Ооочень жесткий матрас. Спать некомфортно, не высыпались. Кровать на подиуме с выступами, можно запнуться. Полы только подметают. Уборка средняя.

sample_comments.title: Good cost performance.
sample_comments.text:
I stayed alone in a small room to save money. It was on the second floor, accessible by stairs. The room had air conditioning, a refrigerator, a hairdryer, a kettle, beach sandals, coffee, water, shampoo, and shower gel, so it was convenient. The shower had warm water and moderate pressure. At night, I could hear sounds like noises from appliances or the washing machine, which might be a bit loud, but since it felt like normal living sounds, I was able to sleep. 

Since there was a window, I could open it and enjoy the tropical air while lounging on the bed. The breakfast buffet was quite exciting, and everything was delicious. It was easy to access the beach like a private beach, and I could sunbathe on the bed. The massage shop near the hotel was very inexpensive. After it rained, the road in front of the hotel had puddles, making it difficult to walk. There was a supermarket about a 10-minute walk from the hotel where I could buy plenty of souvenirs. There were also many restaurants on the street.

I used the hotel laundry service. I dropped off my laundry in the morning, and it was ready the next morning. It cost 60,000 dong per kilogram. 

Since I could stay at this price, I think it would be nice to stay here again when I come to Phu Quoc Island. ^_^

sample_comments.title: Value for money accommodation
sample_comments.text: The location is a bit remote, but it's right in front of the beach, making it great for having fun freely. There are many grocery stores, restaurants, and massage shops nearby. The overall cleanliness seems fine, but the cleaning state under the bathroom sink and the corners of the shower booth are somewhat lacking. The pool is spacious and deep, but you need to be careful because the water level differences are confusing; the height of the steps varies, so you might suddenly slip or scrape your toes. There aren't enough hangers or drying racks in the room to dry swimsuits. At night in the restaurant, there's someone playing guitar and singing, and they kept trying to engage me and sing to me, which made me a little uncomfortable :( However, the BBQ was really delicious! The pork belly was the best, and the grilled shrimp, squid, and the recommended grilled fish were also excellent! The resort is really beautiful and reasonably priced, so I like it a lot ㅎㅎ I would love to use it again next time ㅎㅎ

sample_comments.title: Exceptional

sample_comments.title: It is a cost-effective accommodation.
sample_comments.text: It's literally a cost-effective accommodation. The view is nice and the staff are friendly. However, the path to the accommodation is dirty. In the evening, I saw two rats running on the way... I think I will use it again for its cost-effectiveness. It's also close to King Kong Mart. I like that breakfast is provided. The fridge's cooling varies from room to room. I recommend keeping the air conditioner on all day.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional

sample_comments.title: Sunset Beautiful Resort
sample_comments.text:
The resort is very close to the airport, just a 10-minute drive. You can take bus number 17 and get off at Bảo tàng Cội Nguồn, then walk for 5 minutes to reach it. The resort is set back from the road and has a private beach, making it feel very tranquil. I chose to stay here to watch the sunset from the private beach. 
⭐Advantages: 
1⃣ There is a private beach and an infinity pool, with a perfect angle to see the beautiful sunset. You don't have to go to special bars like other hotel guests for the sunset view. The resort's lounge chairs are free to use, and you can enjoy a whole afternoon on the beach without placing any orders. During my stay, I spent two days just relaxing in the hotel, watching the sea. 
2⃣ A daily breakfast is included, served from 6:30 to 10:00 every morning. The room rate is affordable, and the breakfast is decent, with ocean-view seating and a wide variety, including both Chinese and Western options, with slight changes daily. There are also dedicated stalls for pho and eggs. 
3⃣ The surrounding amenities are great. There are many massage parlors nearby, which are quite comfortable and cheaper than those in Sunset Town. The Giant supermarket is about a 5-minute walk away (reportedly the largest supermarket on the island?), and I like to go browse when I have time. 
4⃣ The nearby restaurants are good. I particularly enjoy MEO restaurant, which serves decent Vietnamese cuisine, with meals for two under 100, great taste and generous portions, but it can get crowded with Koreans and you might need to wait. Another restaurant, Nhà Vàng Restaurant, is also good, although the fish sauce in their pho can be a bit strong depending on personal taste. Their garlic stir-fried morning glory is the best, with two meals costing around 75.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Отличное расположение. Приятный и отзывчивый персонал. Всё было просто супер. Спасибо персоналу за отличный отпуск.

sample_comments.title: Right on the beach
sample_comments.text:
We had an amazing stay. The location is unbeatable---right on the beach, with stunning views. The breakfast was a highlight, offering a delicious variety of options while we enjoyed a breathtaking view of the beach.

The hotel is also close to lots of nice cafes, restaurants and the well-known KingKong Market which is great for shopping. 

Our room was quiet and comfortable. We couldn't have asked for a better experience.

Кормят вкусно, порции хорошие!Лежаки всегда есть! Великолепный бассейн, супер!! красивый закат! Убираются хорошо, полотенца чистые. Рекомендую, соберусь на фукуок однозначно в этот отель!

sample_comments.positives: Отличный отель, всем рекомендую, с удовольствием вернусь еще

sample_comments.title: Cozy, charming resort
sample_comments.text:
We stayed for 2 nights and absolutely loved the surroundings!! 
The price is quite reasonable but the quality will not disappoint you. 
Nice beach and a pool. They have swings and hammock. 
The breakfast is ok, too. They serve you different types of noodles every day and it was delicious !! 
Not hard to find places to eat around the hotel as well. A big supermarket is just nearby so quite convenient. 
Of course it's not a 5-star hotel but if you are looking for a relaxing holiday destination with a good price, this is the place for you. 
Just one tip, don't go there during the rainy season.

sample_comments.title: Очень достойный отель за свою стоимость
sample_comments.positives: Долго выбирали отель и не ошиблись, здесь прекрасное расположение прямо у моря, персонал выше всяких похвал: нарезали красиво нам фрукты, купленные на улице, накрывали стол прямо на пляже, когда мы просили, всегда идут навстречу. Через день на пляже вечеринка-барбекю, живая музыка, свежайшие морепродукты по цене ниже ночного рынка, разрешали приходить со своим вином (мы не каждое пьём). В общем, я прямо рекомендую. Сама локация очень удобная, все рядом, массажи, кафе, бары. Бассейн отличный, только ради фото в нем на фоне заката стоит там побывать. Завтраки очень хорошие, готовят 5 разных блюд из яиц, всегда есть лёгкий супчик, овощи, фрукты и много всего прочего, нам за 7 дней не надоело, очень все разнообразно. После Vida Loca уехали на север в пафосный отель, сидим со скуки умираем, везде все дороже в 2-3 раза, нет этого колорита, который ощутили там.
sample_comments.negatives: Возможно, уборка не идеальна, песок в бунгало был всегда, но это потому что отель практически на пляже.

sample_comments.title: Good service and value for money
sample_comments.text: Amazing seaview in front of u when u had your breakfast .overall it is walkable distance about 5-7mins to public transport bus station.

sample_comments.title: Уголок спокойствия на диковатом острове
sample_comments.positives:
Отличное расположение, комфортный выход к морю, отсутствие громкой музыки. Номера небольшие, с продуманной планировкой и наполнением. 3 раза в неделю в отеле живая музыка и гриль с морепродуктами, рыбой и мясом. Хорошие разнообразные завтраки. В ресторане есть балкончик со столом с видом на море и приземляющиеся самолеты. 
Прогулявшись по пляжу в обе стороны от отеля, поняли, что это действительно лучший вариант в этом районе для спокойного размеренного отдыха. В том числе для отдыха с маленькими детьми.
sample_comments.negatives: В соседнем отеле громкая музыка по вечерам, начинающаяся в 10 вечера. Уборка в номере проводится в непредсказуемое время - может быть в 8 утра, а может и в 3 часа дня. Полотенца в номерах пахнут костром (но это видимо вопрос к прачечной или месту хранения полотенец). К полотенцам на пляже никаких вопросов. Обратились с этой проблемой к менеджеру, на следующий день полотенца в номере пахли не только костром, но и ароматизатором, а потом все вернулось к обычному аромату.

sample_comments.title: Good stay at Vida Loca
sample_comments.text: All great value for money, staff super friendly and helpful (kudos to all of them on site during our stay especially Minh and Tuyen). Would be 5 stars if the owner can fix the flooding issue on the entrance and the restaurant meal price is improved.

sample_comments.text:

Zdecydowanie położenie, na samej plaży. Dobre śniadanie, bardzo pomocna obsługa recepcji. Mieszkaliśmy w bungalowie i dwie noce w budynku głównym... te pokoje w budynku głównym są chyba nawet fajniejsze niż te domki( które są trochę klaustrofobiczne ) ..ale to już co kto woli.

Owszem fajnie wyglądają ryby i owoce morza wystawione na plaży, ale kompletnie nie potrafią ich przygotowywać ( zresztą nie tylko w tym miejscu na mieście było to samo ).

To najsłabszy punkt tego miejsca.

sample_comments.title: Decent location/Good price
sample_comments.text:
Affordable hotel that includes a nice breakfast with a view. Unfortunately there are no shuttles to places like the night market (unlike what is stated in their description). It's 5-10 minute walk to John's Tours so it was ideal for my short time there (took 2 tours) and around a 30min-1hour walk to the night market (one way). Taxis to and from the night market cost around 50-100 vnd and to and from the airport (via grab) was around 100-200 vnd. There's a good restaurant down the block (towards John's tours) that sells good seafood food rice/soup and more restaurants/grocery stores on the main road.
The beach is nice, there are better beaches on the island, but for the price it was fine. If you walk along the beach, you will notice all the garbage that washes up, but the hotel itself is clean enough.
My biggest problem was the mosquitos that attacked one one night. I had around 10-15 bites that were like 2-3cm. After that, I couldn't sleep without "natural bug spray," the fan blasting away the mosquitos away, and slathering on hydrocortisone. The air conditioner worked mostly but the water heater was meh as it didn't always push out hot enough water.

sample_comments.title: Fajne miejsce na wypoczynek i relaks.
sample_comments.positives: Hotel kameralny, bez tłumów, świetnie usytuowany, przy samej plaży. Tradycyjne, azjatyckie śniadania, każdy znajdzie coś dla siebie, brakowało mleka roślinnego. Ceny w restauracji przyjazne, plaża niewielka, ale czysta. Palmy nad plażą i basenem pozwalają skryć się przed palącym słońcem. Czysto, codzienne sprzątanie. W recepcji od ręki i bez problemów można załatwić taksówkę, czy skuter. Bardzo miła i komunikatywna obsługa.
sample_comments.negatives: Bardzo ciemno w pokoju, żarówki niczym przygasające świeczki.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Good location. Great value for money. Staff needs to work on english as very hard to make them understand anything. At times staff was rude specially lady manager in restaurant.

sample_comments.title: Spokój, relaks, komfort, zen.
sample_comments.positives: Hotel butikowy, kameralny, w fajnym zadbanym ogrodzie. Obsługa miła, sympatyczna. Plaża i basen przepiękna. Fajne udogodnienia jak huśtawka i hamak. Leżaków starczyło dla wszystkich. Ręczniki codziennie nowe plażowe - odbierasz i oddajesz przy barze, fajna opcja. Pokoje przestronne, czyste, łóżko ogromne. Wifi w pokojach średnio działa, w barze, na plazy - perfekcyjnie. Śniadania wyśmienite, urozmaicone, europejskie i lokalne potrawy. Bylismy 4 dni, to byl idealny wybór. Będę polecać znajomym!
sample_comments.negatives: Dosyć cienkie ściany i brak "izolacji" powoduje, że głosy i hałasy łatwo się przedostają do pokoju - to typowe dla azjatyckiego budownictwa. Zatyczki do uszu w zupełności wystarczą :)

Do wyboru dania kuchni azjatyckiej (np. Pho, ryż, dimsum), a także jajecznica, sałatki, owoce, kawa, herbata, soki. Trzy razy w tygodniu od 18.30 jest muzyka na żywo i świetne barbecue!

sample_comments.title: Amazing Value if you plan to stay in the resort the whole time.
sample_comments.text:
This resort is perfect if you plan on staying poolside/on the beach all day long which is exactly what we did. The hotel itself is still under construction (we could see them fitting rooms with beds etc.) however it didn't affect our stay at all. 

The room itself was too small to do anything in but wasn't an issue for us since we spent no time in it.

The main downside is the staff in our opinion and if fixed would make it one of the best properties:
-We asked for towels 3 times to shower and got then an hour later
- Night staff wasnt willing to give us a knife/fork for some reason and told us to look in the empty bar ourself
- They take your passport upon checkin and forgot to give us on checkout. We had to ask when we remembered for it and all they could do is laugh and say oops sorry we forgot.

All things aside its an amazing new property with a clean beach and beautiful infinitt pool AND for the price is unbeatable.

A small beachfront hotel with chalets and rooms. About 20 units-thay makes it peaceful and relaxing. While booking suggest book the superior room which are the chalets sea view or garden view. Good breakfast and they have a nightly bbq on the beach.
10 mins walk to the main street where restaurants and shops are plenty. The free vinvest shuttle bud to vinsafsri, vinworld is Infront of the road leading to the resort. Convenien and great location. Phu quoc night market short distance away. Great place on the beach for your base to explore Phu Quoc. Will return on my next visit

sample_comments.positives: Świetna lokalizacja - cicha i spokojna okolica, a jednocześnie blisko do głównej ulicy ze sklepami i restauracjami. Resort ma własną małą, ale czystą i urokliwą plażę. Śniadania były bardzo pyszne i z ogromnym wyborem potraw (codziennie inne) - w restauracji na samej plaży. Czysty i dobrze wyposażony domek. Do dyspozycji leżaki na plaży, pod palmami albo przy basenie. Basen infinity kilka kroków od plaży jest idealny.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
Amazing location right on the beach with lounge beds always available and decent shade with lot of palm trees. Water and sand is always cleaned and there are neighboring facilities offering massages. 

Prices at the beach bar/restaurant are reasonable. But the included breakfast is really the highlight as you have an all you can eat buffet with tons of options and can sit right on the balcony overlooking the water. 

The infinity pool is fantastic as well with good depth and kids side as well and again plenty of shade. 

The only drawback was the bungalow itself as its a bit cramped and gets very hot if the AC is not running. The fan achieves nothing and mosquitoes are constantly present. 

But you tend to ignore that as you are enjoying the facilities the breakfast and the location which is walking distance to all the shops and restaurants on the main road and the giant Kingkong mart.

sample_comments.title: Mały hotelik przy plazy w mieście. Ma wszystko czego potrzebowaliśmy
sample_comments.positives: Pyszne śniadanie, przyjemny basen, czyste nowe klimatyzacje w pokojach.

sample_comments.title: A small and beautiful hotel that gives a vacation feel.
sample_comments.text: This trip lasted nine days and eight nights, with four nights in the south, two nights in the north, and two nights in the central region. We had booked well-known and large chain hotels initially, but the experience was quite disappointing; it was crowded, there was no service, and we even had to fight for sun loungers. In the end, we found this hotel recommended unexpectedly on Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book). At first, I had low expectations, thinking it was just convenient because it was near the airport and close to shopping at the Carrefour supermarket, as well as the night market and the airport. To my surprise, it was breathtaking! The environment was quiet and beautiful, with an infinity pool and a private beach. There were about twenty rooms, many sun loungers available, and large swings. Right outside the room, down the stairs, was the beach and the ocean. The room was spacious and very comfortable, with hot water that was plentiful and hot (unlike in the Accor Jade Bay Apartments, where I couldn't take a comfortable hot shower). The mattress and pillows were of moderate softness (the pillows at Wyndham felt awful like , needing two just to get enough height), and the towels were new and clean (the towels at Wyndham were old and frayed and changed every two days). They even provided towels for the beach! Plus, we could have breakfast facing the ocean, and the view was as beautiful as a painting. So, we decisively gave up on the island-hopping and shopping plans and decided to indulge in the hotel. We went snorkeling in the rocky area of the private beach; although the water wasn't very clear, we saw many fish, crabs, and hermit crabs... and even caught a cat's eye cone snail... and spotted an eel! Finally, on the last day before heading back, we truly felt like we were on vacation. It was both lucky and regrettable; if I had known, I would have stayed here for all five days...

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The room is on the second floor of the front row, and the view is largely blocked by coconut trees. The hotel's location is quite good, being very close to the supermarket. Motorbikes can be rented at the front desk. The room facilities are a bit basic, lacking a table and a dressing table, and there is not much storage space; the bathroom is also somewhat basic. There is a large terrace shared with the neighboring room. The hotel pool is nice, and the breakfast is okay. Personally, I don't think this room type offers great value for money.

sample_comments.title: Super lokalizacja
sample_comments.positives: Super lokalizacja, doskonala na bazę wypadowa zwiedzania wyspy, przemiły personel, bardzo smaczne śniadania, hotel przy samej plaży.
sample_comments.negatives: Brak.

sample_comments.title: A hidden gem
sample_comments.text: This place is very special. The rooms themselves are a bit plain and rustic. However, the beautiful grounds and the pool by the beach were lovely to wake up to. The breakfast buffet was some of the best I had. We stayed at a much more expensive and bigger hotel north of this one, and we found ourselves missing Vida Loca's charming and fresh breakfast selection. Their location by the beach was perfect and the staff were so kind.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Snídaňe rozmanitá dá se říct že jsem na ostrově byla měsíc a tady smekám před snídaní. Pláž dlouhá, moře klidné. Večery s živou hudbou.
sample_comments.negatives: Bungalov velké zklamání , sprcha malá šampon, sprchový mýdlo na zemi když se pro něj ohnete tak se do sprchy nevejdete zákonitě zadkem alebo hlavou označíte sklo a to nejsme prostorově výrazný. Futra do koupelny cca 170cm tak jame se párkrát majzli. Postel z jedné strany přibouchla ke stěně. Špatně se na ní lezlo. Možná pro děti bungalov ok. Pro dospělé nevyhovující. To jediné bylo velké zklamání.

sample_comments.title: I love it so much~!!!
sample_comments.text: I've been to Phu Quoc twice, and I use it every time I go. Highly recommend it for the price!!! The breakfast variety isn't huge but everything was delicious, especially the pho, it was amazing!!! There weren't many Koreans, which was nice, and the accommodation is right in front of the beach, only a 5-minute walk to Oxen Bar, a 10-minute walk to Meo Kitchen, and a 15-minute walk to King Kong Mart. The location is fantastic~!! If I go to Phu Quoc again, I'll definitely go back~

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Bylo to užasný, milý personál. Snídanĕ super, užasný bazén, grilování. Poměr kvalita cena, super.

sample_comments.title: Smack right on the beach
sample_comments.text: We opted for a beachfront bungalow and we were really glad we did. The room is set directly on the beach and is spacious and tastefully decorated. The bed was comfortable and the sound of the waves crashing and the howling wind and the sight of the roiling waves (we came at the end of the rainy season) was truly spectacular. Sunset was very beautiful too. Staff were very sweet and friendly. But there is a minus. Our room is right at the back from the entrance and entails climbing five individual sets of steps. Which can be slippery when wet (it was the rainy season) and the steps does not have railings. This is not a room for the elderly or those with mobility issues. The other issue is that it is a 10 to 15 minute walk to the main road where all the restaurants and marts are (King Kong Mart and Long Beach Mart). But Grab is cheap so you can always grab there. The buffet breakfast is good, with a good mix of western and vietnamese/Asian dishes, including cheese, hams, bacon and fresh salads and fruits. And the restaurant has a lovely view of the sea. I had a very good relaxing stay with good sleep at Vida Loca.
sample_comments.response: Thank you very much for staying at Vida Loca Sunset Beach Resort for taking the time to share your feedback. I would like to sincerely apologize for the shortfall in service. Your feedback is a vital part of our business and it is through your constructive comments that we are able to improve the service we offer to our guests. It would be our pleasure to have the chance of welcoming you back to Vida Loca in the near future, Sincerely, Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Jeg kunne lide at vi boede direkte på stranden. Der var roligt, men samtidig kunne vi nemt og hurtigt gå til byen, hvor der lå mange spisesteder.
Personalet var venlige og imødekommende, og hjalp med det vi havde brug for. 
Hvis vi vender tilbage engang, vil vi klart vælge Vida Loca igen
sample_comments.negatives: Ingenting

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Good location, clean room, nice breakfast and beautiful beaches. Strongly recommended.

sample_comments.title: KATASTROFA, ZLÝ SEN
sample_comments.negatives: Absolútna katastrofa, neskutočne neprofesionálny personál. Ani si nás nepamätali keď sme sa vracali na ubytovanie z pláže a chceli nás vyhodiť že cez ich rezort sa nedá prejsť. V rezorte totálne špinavé lehátka a najhoršie že dovolili každému opitému Rusovi ľahnúť si na uterák meter pred naše lehátka a nechali ich vykrikovať a okupovať pláž. V celom rezorte smeti a špina. Sprcha viac nefungovala ako fungovala. Príšerné. Fotografie klamú. Určite neodporúčam.

sample_comments.title: A nice, quiet, friendly, clean resort for family vacation
sample_comments.text:
An unsuspecting resort we chanced upon while searching for a place for our vacation at Phu Quoc. The rating were high on Maps, agoda and several other places, and we found best prices at Agoda.
The place and people did not disappoint us. The food was lovely at the restuarant. 
Breakfast was low on vegetarian and eggetarian options but we sailed through with bakery, fruits and Omlette. 
The Highlight was the seaside dine out area, the swing and cool infinity swimming pool looking into the sea. 

The staff was super nice and helpful, Nhan, was expectional in helping us book few things and suggest what all we can do while we were there.

The place is bit of a walk from the road and has a climb, so if you want to go to the market, that is atleast 15-20 min walk with some uphill portion.
Taxis pick you and drop effortlessly at the hotel, most taxi drivers seem to know the place by name.
The rooms were good, the segregation between Bed and sit out area was okay, it made the bed area a bit too crumpled. If one person has to get up during anytime, they will have to walk over the other person, cannot do it without waking the other person up.
Overall size of the room was good, but design wise it is 50-50, some may like, some may not.

overall - a great experience. will recommend it to fellow travellers

sample_comments.title: Vrelo odporúčam pre perfektnú dovolenku. Vedľa resortu je super beach bar ktorý večer dotvára atmosféru.
sample_comments.positives: Krásna a najmá čistá pláž, ktorá medzi ostatnými resortami naozaj prekvitala, super bazén s krásnym výhľadom na more, okolie veľmi pekné, odpočívadla, ležadlá a super hojdacia sieť. Naozaj veľmi krásne miesto zo super raňajkami a personálom.
sample_comments.negatives: Železná búda nad kuchyňou a je cítiť že je resort už staršieho vydania. No nuč to nemení na kvalite.

sample_comments.title: Great experience to live on a beach
sample_comments.text: Best location a person can ask to relax n chill from ur hectic to do lives. Will recommend to more frnds n families. Loved it. Bt breakfast options for vegetarian is very less Bt chef n fnb staff was sweet n prepared us 1-2 vegetarian options for us only.

sample_comments.title: Scam, try another hotel
sample_comments.positives: The location is not bad at all. You sre close to drug dealers, boom boom massages and at the end if narrow dark street.
sample_comments.negatives: Scam. I received scam messages shortly after booking, and it made me feel like my booking details were not handled securely. I was contacted by people pretending to be from the hotel. It felt as if my information had been shared without my consent. Extremely disappointing and worrying.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: I love this place so much, everything it's near by! Like near by!!! I do really recommend here and will definitely come back !

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was decent, but a la carte menu at restaurant was way overpriced, small portions, along with very slow service.
sample_comments.negatives: Paid for four nights, stayed for three, then accused of stealing small white towels when we repeatedly stated they were in the shower! Lots of garbage on beach and in the water. Bungalows have the most uncomfortable beds, and you can hear the loud music coming from nearby beach club at night. If you're looking for a good night's sleep, stay elsewhere.

sample_comments.title: Vida Loca Resort, Phu Quoc - A Hidden Gem by the Beach!
sample_comments.text:
If you're looking for a peaceful escape with beach vibes, comfort, and great hospitality --- Vida Loca Resort should be on your list!

Rooms: Spacious, clean, and cozy with either a garden or pool view. The decor is simple yet elegant --- perfect for a relaxing stay.
Beach Access: Just a 1-minute walk to the beach! It's quiet, clean, and gives you that private beach feel.
Food & Drinks: The in-house restaurant serves fresh and delicious food. Don't miss the beachside bar - sipping a drink while watching the sunset here is magical!
Staff: Super friendly and helpful staff. They understand English well and make sure you're comfortable throughout your stay.
Location: Located near Long Beach. Cafes, shops, and even the night market are all within easy reach.

sample_comments.title: Our family have stayed multiple times. We enjoyed the location very much however is left disappointed this time. Very di
sample_comments.positives: Clean rooms and convenient location to many shops.
sample_comments.negatives:
Breakfast could be improved Eg. Fresher produce. 
Controlling mosquitoes in the bedroom before customers check in and during daily room service by keeping the door closed.

sample_comments.title: Good Stat
sample_comments.text: Nice pool near beach with good breakfast selection.

sample_comments.title: Not worth it
sample_comments.positives: The staff is amazing. They literally doo whatever you can to make you feel comfortable and at home. However I thinkk this is the general attitude in SE Asian countries anyways. The building part of the hotel, not the wooden bugalows, is fallg apart. The walls were peeling and and it lookes so old and dirty so does the room. This place os at a very good location but whoever the owner is doesn't take care of the place much. The beach had broken glasses and it almost got my kids foot!! The pool is made of some kind of a stone and it makes you feel like you are in some middle eastern hammam.. the food was basic and very expensive. They give you some discoun vouchers but even then its still pricey. There was also a rat wondering infrint of my room and almost touched my foot then jumped in the air it was pretty disgusting..
sample_comments.negatives: They should renovate this place a little and keep the garden cleaner.. The gardening and management staff talks behind tourists and they think we dont understand that. Its funny.

sample_comments.title: Nice little resort
sample_comments.text: We had the closest room to the beach and it was great. The resort is at walking distance from one of the main street. One of the neighbour resort had a bar with show so it was a bit noisy but by 11.:30 pm it was quiet. We actually went to their show and it was really good. Overall, we would go back to this resort.

sample_comments.title: Overall, I would recommend Vida Loca for its exceptional location, exclusive beach access, and the value it offers at it
sample_comments.positives: The property's unique selling point lies in its prime beachfront location and exclusivity. The restaurant sits right on the shore, offering not just stunning views but also exceptionally prompt service
sample_comments.negatives: While the property offers good value for its price, a few areas leave room for improvement. Firstly, the lack of room service---unlike in most hotels---can be a limitation. The quantity of complimentary in-room drinking water is quite low, and replacing plastic bottles with refillable glass ones would be a more sustainable option. Secondly, the restaurant closes early at 9 PM, and the beachfront area is completely dark afterward, making it impossible to sit by the sea post-dinner. Lastly, the restaurant pricing feels slightly steep when weighed against the available facilities and overall location

sample_comments.title: Great Location and Price / Friendly Staff
sample_comments.text: I'm really enjoyed my stay. The location is great. The staff are friendly and the breakfast that's good. There are plenty of great restaurants, very near the hotel.In addition to the restaurant at the hotel. The hotel has a live music several days a week where you can eat right on the beach and watch the sunset.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: The location's beach front was nice and clean. The staff also clean the rooms and surroundings quite nicely. We like how the staff are accommodating, helpful and had smiles on their faces. The breakfast spread was also good, they change their menu everyday and honestly the food during breakfast was nice!
sample_comments.negatives: The room could have been better. I feel like it was slightly outdated and the beds could have been nicer. The room was also quite small for the price we have paid but it's not so bad. We were still comfortable. sample_comments.title: Best location
sample_comments.text:
It takes about 15 minutes to get to the airport by taxi, and it seems like it doesn't take even 10 minutes to walk to King Kong Mart. There are also many delicious restaurants and massage shops around, so I had a really comfortable time. I also took a trip to the north for a day, and it was okay since it takes about 40 minutes by car to get to Vinpearl Safari. Initially, it seemed that not many Koreans stayed in accommodations in the central area, as I mostly saw Westerners in the same resort. I only met Koreans at King Kong... haha. 
The swimming pool isn't designed to gradually deepen like a ramp, but rather like a bath? The middle depth is 1.8m, and the edges gradually deepen to around 1 to 1.5m in a stepped manner, so if you can't swim well, it would be good to bring a float. We went in January, and even though it was sunny during the day, the pool water was extremely cold, so we had to gather our courage to get in. The private beach in front was quiet and the water was warm, but there were many sharp barnacle-covered rocks, so if you plan to play on the beach, make sure to bring aqua shoes (two out of four in our group got cuts on their feet). Otherwise, if you go a little to the right where many people are playing, there are no rocks over there haha. 
The accommodation facilities are all bungalow-style, and we had a quadruple room with queen-sized beds, so we rested very comfortably, and beach towels were provided according to the number of guests, which was convenient. However, for some reason, whether they had turned off the hot water or it was due to low capacity in the hot water tank, when we turned it to hot water, it came out in a trickle... to the point where we couldn't wash properly, so my friends and I just switched to cold water. It wasn't extremely cold, and since the rest was so cost-effective, it didn't bother us much, but it might be a bit uncomfortable for families with young children or elderly people. 
The front desk staff were friendly, and when we called Grab, they always came right in front of the accommodation, which was convenient in many ways. The breakfast changed the type of pho every day, making it enjoyable to eat, and we could order egg dishes, while the other food options weren't bad either, so we ate well without getting tired of it during our 3-night, 4-day stay. Especially, the view from the breakfast restaurant, overlooking the beach, made it nice to just rest in the resort all day. You can buy beer and lounge on the beach bed. In any case, I think those who are not sensitive to water pressure and temperature can enjoy it incredibly cost-effectively. I recommend it!

sample_comments.title: A small but beautiful resort.

However, there isn't enough space to hang wet swimsuits, and the refrigerator is small, which makes it difficult to store fruits bought from outside. The beach in front of the resort has reefs, so it's hard to play barefoot, and the water is murky, making it insufficient for snorkeling. However, it's great that you can rent paddleboards. The sunbeds in front of the beach are in high demand, haha. The swimming pool is larger than expected, making it nice for playing with tubes. You can also rent a manual pump to inflate the tubes! However, it is a bit deep. The breakfast menu isn't extremely diverse, but almost everything is delicious! The rice noodles are especially good. We stayed for three days, but they didn't tidy up the used coffee cups. Keep that in mind when using them!

sample_comments.title: A cute and charming accommodation with a local vibe in Phu Quoc (recommended)
sample_comments.text: This is an accommodation located in the central area of Phu Quoc. It is decorated like a local village, and the landscaping is beautifully arranged like a resort. I was assigned room 39, which had a great view of the sea, and I loved that even the breakfast restaurant overlooks the ocean. There is a private beach, and although the swimming pool is small, it resembles an infinity pool. The bathroom has separate areas for the sink, bath, and toilet, and the sink and bath area have no ventilation, so there is a bit of mold typical in bathrooms (which can be understood). They provided clean towels and bedding every day, and all the staff members were friendly. Nearby, there are places like King Kong Mart, Meo Kitchen, and Oxen Bar, making it convenient to walk to them. I booked in a hurry right before the Tet holiday at a relatively high price, but I was satisfied enough that I would want to come back even during other periods. I recommend it for couples and families alike.
